headline: TD Cowen Initiates Coverage With a Buy Rating for Arista Networks (ANET)
summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) is one of the 15 AI stocks that are quietly making investors rich. On March 12, Sean O’Loughlin from TD Cowen began coverage of Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) with a $170 price target. The analyst assigned a Buy rating on the shares, which offer a 23% upside potential at the prevailing level. O’Loughlin […]

headline: Meta stock climbs nearly 3% on report of planned layoffs to offset AI spending
